item.request:
POST /my-account/change-email HTTP/2 Host: 0a04003404ee2768801d1c97001f00d9.web-security-academy.net Cookie: session=KkmDk8ZPDsgYYzQkwL31BcnHklXwUMH8 Content-Length: 31 Cache-Control: max-age=0 Sec-Ch-Ua: "Google Chrome";v="147", "Not.A/Brand";v="8", "Chromium";v="147" Sec-Ch-Ua-Mobile: ?0 Sec-Ch-Ua-Platform: "Linux" Origin: https://0a04003404ee2768801d1c97001f00d9.web-security-academy.net Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7 Sec-Fetch-Site: same-origin Sec-Fetch-Mode: navigate Sec-Fetch-User: ?1 Sec-Fetch-Dest: document Referer: https://0a04003404ee2768801d1c97001f00d9.web-security-academy.net/my-account?id=wiener Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br Accept-Language: es-ES,es;q=0.9,en;q=0.8 Priority: u=0, i

item.response: HTTP/2 302 Found Location: /my-account?id=wiener X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN Content-Length: 0
